changes: sync.py - FEATURE - v3.6.2→3.6.4: Planned workout summaries — interval sessions compressed into one-line shapes (e.g. '5×4m @106-120% / 3m Z1'). Two parsers (explicit repeats + flat alternating), strict guards, fail-safe to raw description. Tiered detail: full days 0-7, skeleton + summary days 8-42. workout_summary_stats telemetry. Human-readable time fields (XhYm) throughout. READ_THIS_FIRST display_formatting instruction

examples/agentic/ - NEW: push.py + push-workout.yml — write planned workouts to Intervals.icu calendar via GitHub Actions dispatch or local CLI. Template ID mappings for all 14 Workout Reference sessions
examples/reports/ - UPDATE: All report templates and examples updated with XhYm formatting + Formatting Rule section
